title: Translation Units, Declarations, Diagnostics, and Linking · Memory Repair Bay
summary: An incident responder inherits a corrupted warning-clean multi-file interface dossier, the earliest failing input, and two plausible hypotheses; they must preserve first-failure evidence, repair the cause, and add a regression. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in warning-clean multi-file interface dossier and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Predict macro expansion, conditional compilation, include guards, and header ownership before translation.
Distinguish declarations, tentative and full definitions, linkage, compatible types, and one-definition responsibilities.
Use complete prototypes and compatible parameter and return types across every caller boundary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Preprocessing Boundaries
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug native-systems team handles memory case 8953. Produce bounded C evidence to model translation and diagnostic gates before execution; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Predict macro expansion, conditional compilation, include guards, and header ownership before translation.

Inspect the Preprocessing Boundaries trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
